title: Amarite X Arsenal Compat Data Pack
description: A data pack with a resource pack to make amarite compatible with arsenal weapon racks and back slot
body:
##  About
**A simple data pack that let's you put your amarite long sword and amarite disc in the arsenal's weapon racks**

**for the best expierience with the datapack download the amazing [scissored amarite longswords](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/scissored-amarite-longswords) by KrimsonKolbolt so the sword's rotation matches other weapons. Or download the as Mod version that has the fix built in, in one file!**

## Terms Of Use
**if you want to use or modify this datapack feel free to do so but mentioning my name would be appreciated**

## Reporting Problems
**If you have any problems join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/kMuxe42c9j) or tell me in my discord dm @_hellay**
